hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs route and manage high-risk PEP cases through structured enhanced due diligence workflows with traceable audit evidence and real-time regulatory rule updates.

problem_title: High-risk PEP reviews depend on manual routing
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with inconsistent case escalation and fragmented risk data when high-risk PEP results lack structured workflows. This slows enhanced due diligence and weakens audit readiness across digital asset compliance operations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects screening outputs, risk signals, internal policies and case workflows to streamline enhanced due diligence with clear escalation, audit evidence and consistent operational control for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From screening alerts to EDD case review
workflow_description: SFTY routes high-risk PEP screening alerts through compliance rules, opening cases for enhanced due diligence with decision logging and audit evidence preservation.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. Structured evidence control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects screening results with PEP case workflows, decisions and audit-ready evidence to support consistent, defensible and scalable high-risk PEP review for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing enhanced due diligence workflows with structured evidence, provider orchestration and secure deployment for stronger bank and audit readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for high-risk PEP review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures screening outputs into enhanced due diligence workflows, helping VASPs manage high-risk PEP cases with audit-ready evidence and consistent regulatory rule alignment.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle high-risk PEP workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes high-risk PEP alerts into escalated review cases, applies internal policies, records decisions and tracks reviewer actions across connected risk signals and provider inputs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve PEP review evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves all case activity, decision logs and supporting evidence in an auditable format to support compliance reviews, inspections and reporting workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects and orchestrates existing KYC, KYB, KYT, sanctions screening and case management systems into one controlled compliance workflow layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace sanctions or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace screening providers but integrates their outputs into structured workflows for consistent review and traceable decision-making.
final_title: Structure high-risk PEP reviews with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY routes high-risk PEP cases into enhanced due diligence workflows with audit-ready evidence and regulatory rule alignment.
